use_codes.desc: TREATMENT OF THE SIGNS AND SYMPTOMS OF DRY EYE DISEASE (DED)

indications.text:
MIEBO® (perfluorohexyloctane ophthalmic solution) is indicated for the treatment of the signs and symptoms
of dry eye disease (DED).
